info.title: Gather API
info.description: Social scheduling API for coordinating meetups with friends based on mutual availability

calendarIds.description: External calendar IDs to import. Unselected calendars will have importEnabled set to false.

message.example: Can we do an hour later?

userIds.description: User IDs to query busy times for (must be the current user or accepted friends)

phones.description: Raw phone numbers from the device address book. Normalized to E.164 server-side before matching.

post.description: Handle Apple Sign In callback and create/update user

get.description: Get blocked time windows for the current user (times when NOT available)

post.description: Create a new blocked time window (mark time as unavailable)

patch.description: Update an existing blocked time window

delete.description: Delete an existing blocked time window

get.description: Get all calendar connections for the current user

post.description: Bulk sync calendars and their events from the device. Upserts calendar connections, syncs cached events, and removes deselected calendars.

delete.description: Remove all Apple Calendar connections for the current user
Remove all Google Calendar connections for the current user
Remove all Outlook Calendar connections for the current user

get.description: Get the Google OAuth consent URL for the current user to authorize calendar access

schema.description: Request export (write) scope in addition to read scopes

parameters.description: Request export (write) scope in addition to read scopes
parameters.name: includeExportScope

get.description: List the user's Google calendars (fetched live from Google API). Requires an existing Google connection.

post.description: Choose which Google calendars to import for availability tracking
Trigger a server-side re-sync of all connected Google calendars for the current user

get.description: Get the Outlook OAuth consent URL for the current user to authorize calendar access

schema.description: Request export (write) scope in addition to read scopes

parameters.description: Request export (write) scope in addition to read scopes
parameters.name: includeExportScope

get.description: List the user's Outlook calendars (fetched live from Microsoft Graph API). Requires an existing Outlook connection.

post.description: Choose which Outlook calendars to import for availability tracking
Trigger a server-side re-sync of all connected Outlook calendars for the current user

get.description: Get the export sync status for each calendar provider (google, outlook, apple)

post.description: Enable syncing Gather events to the user's calendar. Creates a "Gather" secondary calendar if needed.
Disable syncing Gather events to the user's calendar.
Re-sync all active Gather events to the user's export calendars.

get.summary: Get Google OAuth URL with export scope
get.description: Get the Google OAuth consent URL including the calendar.app.created write scope for enabling event export

get.summary: Get Outlook OAuth URL with export scope
get.description: Get the Outlook OAuth consent URL with Calendars.ReadWrite scope for enabling event export

post.summary: Generate an emoji for given text
post.description: Generate a single emoji that represents the provided text using AI, with caching

get.description: Get events for the current user

post.description: Create a new event

get.description: Get a specific event by ID

post.description: Respond to an event invitation
Get busy time intervals for specified users within a date range. Returns a map of userId to sorted, merged busy intervals from all sources (blocked windows, calendar events, and in-app events).

get.description: Get all friends of the current user

post.description: Find which of your phone contacts are already on Gather (excludes you and current friends)
Generate a new invite code
Send a friend request to another user
Accept a friend request
Decline a friend request
Block a user
Report a user for inappropriate behavior

delete.description: Remove a friend or cancel a friend request

get.description: Get all groups owned by the current user

post.description: Create a new group

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

patch.description: Update the profile of the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Delete the currently authenticated user account

get.description: Get another user's public profile (name, avatar, and your relationship to them). Used e.g. when tapping an attendee in a shared event.

post.description: Register a push notification token for the current user

get.description: Get the notification preferences for the current user

put.description: Update the notification preferences for the current user

post.description: Create an invite for someone not yet on Gather. Returns a shareable link to send from your own device.
Redeem a pending invite by its token (e.g. when the recipient taps the link after installing).
